sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.461 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent which is taken on record. Learned counsel states that in view of the observation contained vide order dated 11.03.2026, it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within ninety days. Learned counsel seeks that pending the foregoing, no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising herefrom. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this reference application may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
